vital_renewal.desc: When you Slow , Freeze , Poison or Burn with an item, a Regeneration item gains + 1/2/3 Regeneration for the fight.

vital_reserve.name: Vital Reserve
vital_reserve.desc: Your rightmost Regen item has + 2/4/6/8 Regen .

void_energy.name: Void Energy
void_energy.desc: When you Burn , Charge a Shield item 1 second(s).

void_rage.name: Void Rage
void_rage.desc: When you Burn , Haste an item for 1/2 second(s).

void_render.name: Void Render
void_render.desc: When you destroy an item during combat, your Weapons gain 100/200 Damage and your Burn items gain 10/20 Burn for the fight.

wake_up_call.name: Wake-Up Call
wake_up_call.desc: When you use a Small item, Haste a Burn , Poison , or Freeze item for 1 second.

walk_in_clinic.name: Walk-in Clinic
walk_in_clinic.desc: Your leftmost Regen item has + 2/4/6/8 Regen .

warm_hugs.name: Warm Hugs
warm_hugs.desc: When you use a Friend , Burn 2/3 .

waters_of_infinity.name: Waters of Infinity
waters_of_infinity.desc: You have + 20/30/40 Regen for each non- Weapon item you have.

well_oiled_machine.name: Well-Oiled Machine
well_oiled_machine.desc: When you use The Core , reduce an item's Cooldown by 5% for the fight.

workin_hard.name: Workin' Hard
workin_hard.desc: Your Weapons have + 7/14 Damage for each Tool you have.

outlands_terror.name: Outlands Terror
outlands_terror.bazaar_desc: Outlands Terror: See 13 enchantments, 4 hidden abilities. Offered by 14 merchants. Obtained from 1 source. Every 8.0 sec.: Deal [300/600] Damage Passive: While you are Enraged, this has Lifesteal and its Cooldown reduced by [3/5] seconds. Passive: You have double Rage gain. Patch 13.3.

weather_machine.name: Weather Machine
weather_machine.bazaar_desc: Weather Machine: See 13 enchantments, 4 hidden abilities. Offered by 18 merchants. Obtained from 2 sources. Every 5.0 sec.: [2/3/4] items start Flying Freeze an item on each Player's board for [1/2/3] second(s) Slow all items for [1/2/3] second(s) Patch 13.3.
